intent: Follow up after a client meeting
key_facts: Discussed a 15% increase to the Q3 marketing budget
Need an updated proposal by Friday
Sarah from finance will join the next call
human_reference_email:
Subject: Follow-Up: Q3 Marketing Budget Discussion

Dear Mr. Thompson,

Thank you for taking the time to meet with us today. I wanted to follow up on our discussion regarding the proposed 15% increase to the Q3 marketing budget.

As agreed, we will prepare an updated proposal reflecting these changes and send it to you by Friday. Please also note that Sarah from our finance team will be joining our next call to walk through the cost breakdown in detail.

Please let me know if there is anything further you would like us to address before then.

Best regards,
Alex Reyes

intent: Request proposal details from a vendor
key_facts: Evaluating vendors for a cloud migration project
Need a pricing breakdown by service tier
Decision deadline is the end of the month
human_reference_email:
Subject: Request for Detailed Proposal - Cloud Migration

Dear Ms. Patel,

We are currently evaluating vendors for an upcoming cloud migration project and would like to request a more detailed proposal from your team.

Specifically, could you provide a pricing breakdown by service tier so we can compare options accurately? We are aiming to make a final decision by the end of the month, so a prompt response would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your continued support throughout this process.

Sincerely,
Jordan Lee

intent: Apologize to a customer for a delayed shipment
key_facts: Shipment was delayed due to a customs issue
New delivery date is June 25
Offering a 10% discount on the customer's next order
human_reference_email:
Subject: Update on Your Order - Our Apologies for the Delay

Dear Mr. Nguyen,

I'm sorry to share that your recent order has been delayed due to an unexpected customs issue. I know this isn't the news you were hoping for, and I want to personally apologize for the inconvenience.

Your order is now expected to arrive by June 25. As a small gesture of goodwill, we would also like to offer you a 10% discount on your next order with us.

Thank you for your patience and understanding. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions in the meantime.

Warm regards,
Priya Shah

intent: Give the team a project status update
key_facts: Backend API work is about 80% complete
Frontend integration starts next week
No major blockers currently
human_reference_email:
Subject: Quick Project Update

Hey team,

Wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand. The backend API is about 80% done, and we're on track to kick off frontend integration next week. No major blockers right now, so things are moving smoothly.

Will keep you posted as we get further into integration. Let me know if you have any questions!

Cheers,
Sam

key_facts: Original meeting was Tuesday at 2pm
Proposed new time is Thursday at 10am
Need confirmation by end of day tomorrow
human_reference_email:
Subject: Request to Reschedule Tuesday's Meeting

Dear Ms. Garcia,

I'm writing to ask if we could reschedule our meeting originally planned for Tuesday at 2pm. Would Thursday at 10am work on your end instead?

Could you kindly confirm by end of day tomorrow so we can finalize the new time? I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Thank you for your flexibility.

Best regards,
Daniel Cho

intent: Escalate a production outage to leadership
key_facts: Production servers have been down since 9am
All EU customers are affected
Engineering team is investigating now
human_reference_email:
Subject: URGENT: Production Outage Affecting EU Customers

Hi all,

We have a critical issue: our production servers have been down since 9am and all EU customers are currently affected.

Our engineering team is investigating right now and treating this as top priority. I will send an update within the hour, but wanted to flag this immediately given the impact.

Please let me know if you need anything further on my end.

Thanks,
Maria Lopez

intent: Thank a guest speaker after a conference
key_facts: They spoke at our annual conference last week
Attendee feedback was overwhelmingly positive
We would like to invite them back next year
human_reference_email:
Subject: Thank You for Speaking at Our Conference

Dear Dr. Williams,

I just wanted to say thank you again for speaking at our annual conference last week. The feedback from attendees has been overwhelmingly positive, and many people told us your session was a highlight of the event.

We would love to have you back next year if you're open to it. Either way, we're so grateful for the time and insight you shared with us.

With appreciation,
Emily Foster

intent: Cold outreach to a potential client
key_facts: Our service reduces cloud infrastructure costs by about 30%
We're offering a free 15-minute cost audit
We work with SaaS companies with 50-200 employees
human_reference_email:
Subject: Cutting Your Cloud Costs by ~30%

Hi Mr. Adebayo,

Many SaaS companies your size (50-200 employees) are overpaying for cloud infrastructure without realizing it. On average, we help our clients reduce those costs by about 30%.

I'd like to offer you a free 15-minute cost audit so you can see exactly where the savings would come from, no obligation attached.

Would you be open to a short call this week?

Best,
Chris Bennett

intent: Decline a request to extend a contract deadline
key_facts: We cannot extend the contract deadline
Our budget cycle closes this quarter
We're willing to revisit the request in Q1 next year
human_reference_email:
Subject: Re: Contract Deadline Extension Request

Dear Mr. Ibrahim,

Thank you for reaching out about extending the contract deadline. After reviewing internally, we're unable to accommodate an extension at this time, as our budget cycle closes this quarter.

That said, we would be glad to revisit this request in Q1 of next year if circumstances allow. I appreciate your understanding and apologize for any disruption this causes.

Please let me know if you'd like to discuss alternatives in the meantime.

Regards,
Lena Novak

intent: Deliver news of a job position being eliminated
key_facts: The position has been eliminated due to company restructuring
A severance package of two months' pay is included
HR will follow up with full details this week
human_reference_email:
Subject: Important Update Regarding Your Position

Dear Marcus,

I need to share some difficult news. As part of a company-wide restructuring, your position has been eliminated, effective this month.

This decision was not made lightly, and I want you to know it reflects organizational changes rather than your performance. You will receive a severance package equivalent to two months' pay, and our HR team will reach out this week with the full details and next steps.

I'm truly sorry to be delivering this news, and I'm happy to talk through any questions you have.

Sincerely,
Rachel Kim
